allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('count:', d.movies.length\); console.log\('missing tmdb_id:', d.movies.filter\(m=>!m.tmdb_id\).length\); console.log\('missing poster:', d.movies.filter\(m=>!m.poster_url || !m.poster_url.startsWith\('https://image.tmdb.org'\)\).length\); console.log\('sample:', d.movies[0]\);")
